basic_details.job_title: BEL Security Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 14 Jr. Supervisor, Havildar Posts
basic_details.short_information: Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) has officially released the Jr. Supervisor (Security) / Havildar (Security) Recruitment 2026 notification (Advt. No. 383/Sec-Rec/2026-27) for 14 vacancies across India. Eligible 10th pass (SSLC Pass) candidates aged up to 43 years can apply offline until 01 July 2026 through the prescribed application format available on the BEL official website. Selected candidates will be appointed on a regular full-time basis with a pay scale of ₹20,500–79,000 for Havildar (Security) and ₹24,500–90,000 for Jr. Supervisor (Security).

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 43 years. Age Relaxation: OBC (NCL) 3 years, SC/ST 5 years.

qualification.details: Jr. Supervisor (Security): SSLC + 15 years of service in Indian Armed Forces and JCO rank. Havildar (Security): SSLC + 15 years of service in Indian Armed Forces.

salary_details.details: Jr. Supervisor (Security): WG-VII/CP-V/ 24,500-3%-90,000 Havildar (Security): WG-III / CP-III/ 20,500 -3% - 79,000

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://bel-india.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 01-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BEL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of the offline application form for BEL Recruitment 2026 is 01 July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by BEL?
faq.answer: Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) has released a total of 14 vacancies for the posts of Jr. Supervisor (Security) and Havildar (Security) through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for these posts is SSLC (Secondary School Leaving Certificate) pass. Specific service experience in the Indian Armed Forces is also a mandatory requirement for both posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the BEL recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 43 years. Age relaxation is applicable for OBC (NCL) candidates by 3 years and for SC/ST candidates by 5 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for Jr. Supervisor (Security) is WG-VII/CP-V/ 24,500-3%-90,000, and for Havildar (Security) it is WG-III / CP-III/ 20,500 -3% - 79,000.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for BEL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for BEL Jr. Supervisor and Havildar posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will include a Physical Endurance Test followed by a Written Test.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the BEL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it carefully, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location for this recruitment is Bengaluru, Karnataka.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates as mentioned in the official notification.
